function_v0.doc: Keep the contract alive. Anyone may call.
function_v0.name: ping

function_v0.doc: Current ZSOZSO balance held by the vault.
function_v0.name: balance

function_v0.doc: Withdraw the entire ZSOZSO balance of the vault to the owner.\nCallable only by the owner, and only after the unlock ledger.
function_v0.name: withdraw

function_v0.doc:
Initialise the vault.

- `owner`: the only account that will ever be allowed to withdraw.
- `token`: the Stellar Asset Contract address of ZSOZSO on Mainnet.

A random unlock ledger between 365 and 730 days from the current
ledger is chosen at construction time.
function_v0.name: __constructor

function_v0.doc: Ledger sequence at which `withdraw` becomes callable.
function_v0.name: unlock_ledger
